name: Message Node
description: Displays a message and passes it through.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class MessageNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Message Node"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("msg", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_output("out", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        msg = str(inputs.get("msg", ""))
        print(f"MESSAGE: {msg}")
        return {"out": msg}

def register_node():
    return MessageNode
